/usr/bin/ar qc liblualib.a CMakeFiles/lualib.dir/lapi.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib.dir/lcode.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib.dir/ldebug.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib.dir/ldo.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib.dir/ldump.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib.dir/lfunc.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib.dir/lgc.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib.dir/llex.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib.dir/lmem.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib.dir/lobject.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib.dir/lopcodes.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib.dir/lparser.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib.dir/lstate.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib.dir/lstring.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib.dir/ltable.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib.dir/ltests.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib.dir/ltm.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib.dir/lundump.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib.dir/lvm.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib.dir/lzio.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblualib.a
